description: Compute schema conformance, AACR, wrong-channel rate, wrong-channel escalation, PTMAR, unsafe authorization, defer rate, and action-specific under-recognition.
Compare unguided AACR and failure phenotypes across GPT-4.1, Claude, Gemini, and optional models.
Tabulate dominant error type for each model; assess whether wrong-channel escalation remains dominant.
Apply deterministic evidence-contract controller to each model's outputs and compare corrected AACR, wrong-channel rate, PTMAR, and unsafe authorization.
For each model, use paired exact McNemar-style/binomial sign test comparing unguided correctness vs controller-corrected correctness.
Use descriptive comparisons primarily; avoid overclaiming inferential superiority unless a formal paired design and multiplicity plan is added.
